title: Uruguayan Seafood Bowl
description: A hearty, flavorful bowl filled with Uruguayan-inspired seafood, perfect for a satisfying meal.

ingredients.name: Gloriously Grilled Shrimp
ingredients.notes: Marinated in a zesty mixture of Uruguayan spices

ingredients.name: Seafood Soup Broth
ingredients.notes: Homemade broth made with seafood-friendly spices

instructions: Heat the seafood soup broth in a large pot over medium heat.
Add the Briny Mussels and cook until they open, about 3-4 minutes.
Remove the mussels from the broth and set aside.
Add the Gloriously Grilled Shrimp to the broth and cook for an additional 2-3 minutes.
Stir in the Uruguayan Rice and cook according to package instructions.
To assemble the bowls, place a scoop of the rice mixture in the bottom, followed by the mussels and shrimp.
Top with Crispy Seafood Crackers and garnish with chopped Fresh Cilantro.
